Other indicators of ketosis include a metallic taste in the mouth, or bad breath.
This can lead to a condition called "ketosis", which can cause bad breath, nausea and a bad taste in the mouth.
Ketosis is a state in which the body burns its own fat for fuel and can "cause health problems, such as kidney failure, " according to the medical Web site WebMD.
